items.name: Cloud PBX
items.shortDescription: Enterprise-grade virtual phone system designed for modern businesses.
items.description: Enterprise-grade virtual phone system designed for modern businesses. Scale from 5 to 50,000 users seamlessly with 1-second billing precision.
features: HD voice quality with Opus codec

hero.subtitle: Enterprise Virtual Phone System
hero.description: Scale from 5 to 50,000 users with enterprise-grade voice quality, global coverage, and AI-powered features. No hardware required.

featureList.title: Auto Attendant
featureList.description: Professional IVR with custom greetings and routing.

featureList.title: Call Recording
featureList.description: Automatic call recording with AI transcription.

featureList.title: Voicemail to Email
featureList.description: Transcribed voicemails delivered to your inbox.

featureList.title: Mobile App
featureList.description: Make and receive calls from anywhere on any device.

featureList.title: Call Analytics
featureList.description: Real-time dashboards and performance metrics.

featureList.title: Team Messaging
featureList.description: Built-in team chat and file sharing.

items.name: SIP Trunking
items.shortDescription: Connect your existing PBX infrastructure to the cloud.
items.description: Connect your existing PBX infrastructure to the cloud through pristine Wholesale VoIP Termination. Unlimited concurrent channels.

hero.subtitle: Wholesale VoIP Termination
hero.description: Connect your PBX to the cloud with unlimited SIP trunks, instant provisioning, and carrier-grade reliability. Pay only for what you use.

featureList.title: Global DID Numbers
featureList.description: Local and toll-free numbers in 100+ countries.

featureList.title: Emergency Calling
featureList.description: E911 compliance with dynamic location routing.

featureList.title: Call Routing
featureList.description: Advanced routing with failover and load balancing.

featureList.title: Real-time Monitoring
featureList.description: Live call quality metrics and alerts.

featureList.title: Encryption
featureList.description: TLS and SRTP encryption for all calls.

featureList.title: API Access
featureList.description: REST API for provisioning and management.

items.name: Conversational AI
items.shortDescription: Deploy AI-powered voice bots that understand context.
items.description: Deploy AI-powered voice bots that understand context, handle complex queries, and seamlessly transfer to human agents.

hero.subtitle: AI Voice Bot & Agent
hero.description: Deploy AI-powered voice bots that handle customer inquiries 24/7, qualify leads, and seamlessly transfer to human agents when needed.

featureList.title: Natural Language

featureList.title: Call Routing
featureList.description: Intelligent routing based on customer needs.

featureList.description: Schedule appointments and send reminders.

featureList.title: Lead Qualification
featureList.description: Score and qualify leads automatically.

featureList.title: CRM Integration
featureList.description: Log all interactions to your CRM.

featureList.title: Analytics

items.name: Cloud Contact Center

items.description: Complete inbound & outbound contact center solution with omnichannel routing and AI-powered tools.
